mapper.sql: r.id, r.student_id, r.reason, r.photo_url, r.dorm_building, r.dorm_room, r.status, r.auditor_id, r.audit_opinion, r.audit_time, r.repairman_phone, r.score, r.comment, r.comment_time, r.created_at, r.updated_at, s.real_name AS student_name, sp.student_no AS student_no, a.real_name AS auditor_name
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM repair_applications r JOIN users s ON r.student_id = s.id LEFT JOIN student_profiles sp ON s.id = sp.user_id LEFT JOIN users a ON r.auditor_id = a.id WHERE r.id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO repair_applications (student_id, reason, photo_url, dorm_building, dorm_room, status) VALUES (#{studentId}, #{reason}, #{photoUrl}, #{dormBuilding}, #{dormRoom}, #{status})
mapper.update: UPDATE repair_applications SET status = #{status}, auditor_id = #{auditorId}, repairman_phone = #{repairmanPhone}, audit_opinion = #{auditOpinion}, audit_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND status = 'PENDING'
UPDATE repair_applications SET status = 'RATED', score = #{score}, comment = #{comment}, comment_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND student_id = #{studentId} AND status = 'COMPLETED'
